channel.title: Comments on: Coast Brewing: 32/50 Kölsch, Ep. 115
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: TucsonTom
item.dc:creator: TucsonTom
item.description: As always, guys, a great show. I happened to try 32/50 as part of a taster set at Charleston's Beer Works (thanks to them for opening their taps early for me). The cloudy wheat aspect was surprising. My favorite American Kolsh is the summer seasonal from your friends at Alaskan Brewing.
item.content:encoded: As always, guys, a great show. I happened to try 32/50 as part of a taster set at Charleston’s Beer Works (thanks to them for opening their taps early for me). The cloudy wheat aspect was surprising. My favorite American Kolsh is the summer seasonal from your friends at Alaskan Brewing.
